chain.expression:
$args = array(
                'headers' => apply_filters(
                    'autoptimize_ccss_cron_api_generate_headers',
                    array(
                        'User-Agent'    => 'Autoptimize v' . AO_CCSS_VER,
                        'Content-type'  => 'application/json; charset=utf-8',
                        'Authorization' => 'JWT ' . $key,
                        'Connection'    => 'close',
                    )
                ),
                'body'    => $body,
            )
echo "<input class='hidden' name='autoptimize_ccss_rules' value='" . json_encode( $ao_ccss_rules, JSON_FORCE_OBJECT ) . "'>";

sink.expression: echo "<input class='hidden' name='autoptimize_ccss_rules' value='" . json_encode( $ao_ccss_rules, JSON_FORCE_OBJECT ) . "'>";

taint_flows.missing_sanitizer: esc_html() / esc_attr() not applied before output
